description: Import via Kibana > Security > Rules > Import

rules.name: PowerShell Encoded Command Execution
rules.description: Detects PowerShell executed with -EncodedCommand or -enc flags, commonly used to obfuscate malicious commands.

rules.name: PowerShell Downloading Files from Internet
rules.description: Detects PowerShell using WebClient or DownloadString — common in dropper and C2 staging.
rules.query: winlog.event_id:1 AND winlog.event_data.CommandLine:(*DownloadString* OR *WebClient* OR *Invoke-WebRequest* OR *curl* OR *wget*) AND winlog.event_data.Image:*powershell*

rules.name: PowerShell Making Outbound Network Connection
rules.description: Detects PowerShell (Sysmon Event ID 3) initiating outbound network connections — may indicate C2 communication.

rules.name: PowerShell Spawned by Office Application
rules.description: Detects PowerShell spawned by Word/Excel/Outlook — a strong indicator of macro-based malware.
rules.query: winlog.event_id:1 AND winlog.event_data.Image:*powershell* AND winlog.event_data.ParentImage:(*winword* OR *excel* OR *outlook* OR *mspub*)
